case_title: JOHN B FLAHOS VS. RITCHIE WILLARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1288 MISSION STREET, UNIT 206, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL. $27.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B SERVED OCT-03-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHOS, JOHN B AS TO DEFENDANT WILLARD, RITCHIE
